domains.name: E-Commerce
domains.summary: The E-Commerce domain is the core business domain of FlowMart, our modern digital marketplace. This domain orchestrates all critical business operations from product discovery to order fulfillment, handling millions of transactions monthly across our global customer base.

attachments.title: ADR-001 - Use Kafka for asynchronous messaging
attachments.description: Learn more about why we chose Kafka for asynchronous messaging in this architecture decision record.

attachments.title: ADR-002 - Database per service
attachments.description: Learn more about why we chose to use a database per service in this architecture decision record.

attachments.title: E-Commerce System Context (C4)
attachments.description: The C4 diagram context of the E-Commerce system

domains.name: Subscriptions
domains.summary: Manages subscription lifecycle, billing cycles, and plan management for recurring revenue streams.

domains.name: Subscription Metrics
domains.summary: SaaS and subscription business metrics including MRR, ARR, churn rates, cohort retention, and customer lifetime value calculations.

domains.name: Product Catalog
domains.summary: Manages product information, categories, inventory, and customer reviews in the e-commerce system.

domains.name: Payment
domains.summary: Domain that contains payment related services and messages for processing financial transactions.

domains.name: Payment Analytics
domains.summary: Comprehensive payment performance metrics including success rates, failure analysis, revenue attribution, and fraud detection insights.

domains.name: Orders
domains.summary: The Orders domain handles all operations related to customer orders, from creation to fulfillment. This documentation provides an overview of the events and services involved in the Orders domain, helping developers and stakeholders understand the event-driven architecture.

domains.name: Order Fulfillment Metrics
domains.summary: Real-time and historical order fulfillment KPIs including processing times, shipping performance, and delivery success rates.

domains.name: Target Architecture
domains.summary: Target state microservices architecture we are migrating towards

domains.name: Target Architecture
domains.summary: Current state of our e-commerce platform architecture

domains.name: Order Processing Flow
domains.summary: Sequence diagram showing the complete order processing flow

domains.name: Order Processing Flow
domains.summary: Sequence diagram showing the original synchronous order processing flow

domains.name: Order Analytics
domains.summary: Aggregated order metrics and KPIs for business intelligence, reporting dashboards, and downstream analytics systems.

services.name: Billing Service
services.summary: Manages billing cycles, invoice generation, and payment scheduling for subscriptions

attachments.title: ADR-001 - Use Kafka for asynchronous messaging

services.name: Payment Gateway Service
services.summary: Manages integration with external payment processors (Stripe, PayPal, etc.)

services.name: Fraud Detection Service
services.summary: Analyzes payment transactions for fraudulent activity and risk assessment

_eventcatalog.schema:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Orders Service API
  description: API for managing customer orders
  version: 1.0.0

servers:
  - url: https://api.example.com/v1
    description: Production server
  - url: https://staging-api.example.com/v1
    description: Staging server

paths:
  /orders:
    get:
      summary: List all orders
      description: Retrieve a list of orders with optional filtering
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          description: Filter orders by status
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [pending, processing, completed, cancelled]
        - name: customerId
          in: query
          description: Filter orders by customer ID
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: page
          in: query
          description: Page number for pagination
          schema:
            type: integer
            minimum: 1
            default: 1
        - name: limit
          in: query
          description: Number of items per page
          schema:
            type: integer
            minimum: 1
            maximum: 100
            default: 20
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successfully retrieved orders
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderList'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

    post:
      summary: Create a new order
      description: Create a new order for a customer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderCreate'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Order created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Order'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

  /orders/{orderId}:
    get:
      summary: Get order by ID
      description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific order
      parameters:
        - name: orderId
          in: path
          required: true
          description: Unique identifier of the order
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Order found
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Order'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

    patch:
      summary: Update order status
      description: Update the status of an existing order
      parameters:
        - name: orderId
          in: path
          required: true
          description: Unique identifier of the order
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderUpdate'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Order updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Order'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

components:
  schemas:
    OrderCreate:
      type: object
      required:
        - customerId
        - items
      properties:
        customerId:
          type: string
          description: Unique identifier of the customer
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderItem'
        shippingAddress:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Address'
        billingAddress:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Address'

    OrderUpdate:
      type: object
      required:
        - status
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, processing, completed, cancelled]
          description: New status of the order

    Order:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Unique identifier of the order
        customerId:
          type: string
          description: Unique identifier of the customer
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, processing, completed, cancelled]
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/OrderItem'
        totalAmount:
          type: number
          format: float
        shippingAddress:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Address'
        billingAddress:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Address'
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    OrderList:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Order'
        pagination:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pagination'

    OrderItem:
      type: object
      required:
        - productId
        - quantity
      properties:
        productId:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
        price:
          type: number
          format: float
        name:
          type: string

    Address:
      type: object
      required:
        - street
        - city
        - country
        - postalCode
      properties:
        street:
          type: string
        city:
          type: string
        state:
          type: string
        country:
          type: string
        postalCode:
          type: string

    Pagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        totalItems:
          type: integer
        totalPages:
          type: integer
        currentPage:
          type: integer
        itemsPerPage:
          type: integer

    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        code:
          type: string
        message:
          type: string
        details:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'

    Unauthorized:
      description: Authentication required
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'

    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'

  securitySchemes:
    BearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

security:
  - BearerAuth: []

openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Simple Task - API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Simple Api
  contact: {}
  license:
    name: apache 2.0
    identifier: apache-2.0
    url: https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html

servers:
  - url: https://example.com/
    
paths:
  /v1/task/{id}:
    put:
      summary: Do Simple Task
      operationId: DoSimpleTask
      responses:
        '200':
          description: do a task by id
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '204':
          description: No content
        '400':
          description: Problem with data
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
        '403':
          description: Not Authorized
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          description: not found
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
        '500':
          description: Internal server error
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
      description: Allows to do a simple task
      security:
        - authorization: []
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string

components:
  schemas:
    Task:
      properties:
        comments:
          type: string
        creationDate:
          type: string
        taskId:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        lastUpdate:
          type: string
      type: object
      additionalProperties: false
    Error:
      properties:
        error:
          type: string
      required:
        - error
      type: object
    Unauthorized:
      properties:
        message:
          type: string
      required:
        - message
      type: object
  securitySchemes:
    authorization:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer

draft.title: In draft awaiting feedback
draft.message:
### Use with caution, still in draft
This event is still in draft. It is not yet ready for production. We are still working on it and collecting feedback from the team.
If you would like to provide feedback, please contact us at [feedback@eventcatalog.io](mailto:feedback@eventcatalog.io) or our slack channel [Order Management](https://join.slack.com/t/eventcatalog/shared_invite/zt-1q900000000000000000000000000000).

If you are looking for a similar event, you can still use the [OrderConfirmed](/docs/events/OrderConfirmed/0.0.1) event, until it is deprecated.

If you want to use this event in lower environments, you can. We are looking for feedback on the event and how it is used in the team.

events.summary: Indicates inventory is out of stock

events.name: Inventory adjusted
events.summary: Indicates a change in inventory level

draft.title: Inventory Adjusted 1.0.1 is in draft
draft.message:
### New version of Inventory Adjusted is in draft

This is a new version of the Inventory Adjusted event. It is not yet ready for production. We are still working on it and collecting feedback from the team.

You can use this version in lower environments, **but please be aware that it is still in draft and may change.**

You can still use a previous version of the event, [Inventory Adjusted 1.0.0](/docs/events/InventoryAdjusted/1.0.0), until that version is deprecated.

_If you would like to provide feedback, please contact us at [feedback@eventcatalog.io](mailto:feedback@eventcatalog.io) or our slack channel [Order Management](https://join.slack.com/t/eventcatalog/shared_invite/zt-1q900000000000000000000000000000)_

_eventcatalog.schema:
{
  "type": "record",
  "namespace": "Tutorialspoint",
  "name": "Employee",
  "doc": "Represents an employee in the organisation HR system.",
  "fields": [
    { "name": "Name", "type": "string", "doc": "Full name of the employee." },
    { "name": "Age", "type": "int", "doc": "Age in years at time of record creation.", "default": 0 },
    { "name": "Department", "type": "string", "doc": "The department the employee belongs to.", "default": "Unknown" },
    { "name": "Position", "type": "string", "doc": "The employee's job title or role.", "default": "Unknown" },
    { "name": "Salary", "type": "double", "doc": "Annual salary in the company currency.", "default": 0.0 },
    { "name": "JoinDate", "type": "string", "logicalType": "date", "doc": "Date employee joined the company. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.", "default": "" }
  ]
}

entities.name: SubscriptionPeriod
entities.summary: Represents a single billing cycle or interval within a subscription's lifetime.

properties.name: subscriptionPeriodId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this specific subscription period.

properties.name: subscriptionId
properties.description: Identifier of the parent Subscription this period belongs to.

properties.name: planId
properties.description: Identifier of the Plan active during this period

properties.name: startDate
properties.description: The start date of this billing period.

properties.name: endDate
properties.description: The end date of this billing period.

properties.name: invoiceId
properties.description: Identifier of the invoice created for this period's charge.

properties.name: paymentId
properties.description: Identifier of the payment that settled the invoice for this period.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status specific to this period (reflects invoicing/payment state).

properties.name: amountBilled
properties.description: The actual amount billed for this period (could differ from plan due to promotions, usage, etc.).

properties.name: currency
properties.description: Currency of the billed amount.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Timestamp when this period record was created (often at the start of the period).

entities.name: BillingProfile
entities.summary: Stores billing-related contact information and preferences for a customer, often used for invoices and communication.

properties.name: billingProfileId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the billing profile.

properties.name: customerId
properties.description: Identifier of the customer this billing profile belongs to.

properties.name: billingEmail
properties.description: Specific email address for sending invoices and billing notifications

properties.name: companyName
properties.description: Company name for billing purposes.

properties.name: taxId
properties.description: Tax identification number (e.g., VAT ID, EIN).

properties.name: billingAddressId
properties.description: Identifier for the primary billing address associated with this profile.

properties.name: preferredPaymentMethodId
properties.description: Customer's preferred payment method for charges related to this profile.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Timestamp when the billing profile was created.

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Timestamp when the billing profile was last updated.

entities.name: Review
entities.summary: Represents customer reviews and ratings for products.

properties.name: reviewId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the review

properties.name: productId
properties.description: Product being reviewed

properties.name: customerId
properties.description: Customer who wrote the review

properties.name: orderId
properties.description: Order associated with this review (for verified purchases)

properties.name: rating
properties.description: Rating given by customer (1-5 stars)

properties.name: title
properties.description: Review title or headline

properties.name: content
properties.description: Review content and comments

properties.name: isVerifiedPurchase
properties.description: Whether this review is from a verified purchase

properties.name: isRecommended
properties.description: Whether customer recommends this product

properties.name: helpfulVotes
properties.description: Number of helpful votes received

properties.name: totalVotes
properties.description: Total number of votes received

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current review status

properties.name: moderationNotes
properties.description: Internal moderation notes

properties.name: images
properties.description: URLs of images uploaded with the review

properties.name: pros
properties.description: List of positive aspects mentioned

properties.name: cons
properties.description: List of negative aspects mentioned

properties.name: merchantResponse
properties.description: Response from merchant to this review

properties.name: content
properties.description: Merchant response content

properties.name: respondedAt
properties.description: When merchant responded

properties.name: respondedBy
properties.description: Who responded for the merchant

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Date and time when the review was created

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Date and time when the review was last updated

properties.name: moderatedAt
properties.description: Date and time when the review was moderated

entities.name: Product
entities.summary: Represents a product or service available for purchase in the e-commerce system.

properties.name: productId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the product

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the product

properties.name: description
properties.description: Detailed description of the product

properties.name: sku
properties.description: Stock Keeping Unit - unique product identifier

properties.name: price
properties.description: Current selling price of the product

properties.name: categoryId
properties.description: Category this product belongs to

properties.name: brand
properties.description: Brand name of the product

properties.name: weight
properties.description: Weight of the product in kilograms

properties.name: dimensions
properties.description: Product dimensions (length, width, height)

properties.name: isActive
properties.description: Whether the product is currently available for sale

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Date and time when the product was created

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Date and time when the product was last updated

properties.name: images
properties.description: URLs of product images

properties.name: inventory
properties.description: Inventory information for this product

properties.name: reviews
properties.description: Customer reviews for this product

entities.name: Inventory
entities.summary: Tracks stock levels and availability for products.

properties.name: inventoryId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the inventory record

properties.name: productId
properties.description: Product this inventory record tracks

properties.name: sku
properties.description: Stock Keeping Unit matching the product SKU

properties.name: quantityOnHand
properties.description: Current available stock quantity

properties.name: quantityReserved
properties.description: Quantity reserved for pending orders

properties.name: quantityAvailable
properties.description: Calculated available quantity (onHand - reserved)

properties.name: minimumStockLevel
properties.description: Minimum stock level before reorder alert

properties.name: maximumStockLevel
properties.description: Maximum stock level for inventory management

properties.name: reorderPoint
properties.description: Stock level that triggers reorder process

properties.name: reorderQuantity
properties.description: Quantity to order when restocking

properties.name: unitCost
properties.description: Cost per unit for inventory valuation

properties.name: warehouseLocation
properties.description: Physical location or bin where item is stored

properties.name: lastRestockedAt
properties.description: Date and time of last restock

properties.name: lastSoldAt
properties.description: Date and time of last sale

properties.name: isTrackingEnabled
properties.description: Whether inventory tracking is enabled for this product

properties.name: backorderAllowed
properties.description: Whether backorders are allowed when out of stock

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Date and time when the inventory record was created

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Date and time when the inventory record was last updated

entities.name: Category
entities.summary: Represents a product category with hierarchical structure support.

properties.name: categoryId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the category

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the category

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description of the category

properties.name: slug
properties.description: URL-friendly identifier for the category

properties.name: parentCategoryId
properties.description: Parent category for hierarchical structure

properties.name: childCategories
properties.description: Subcategories under this category

properties.name: level
properties.description: Depth level in the category hierarchy (0 = root)

properties.name: isActive
properties.description: Whether the category is currently active

properties.name: sortOrder
properties.description: Display order within the same level

properties.name: icon
properties.description: Icon URL or identifier for the category

properties.name: imageUrl
properties.description: Category banner or thumbnail image

properties.name: seoTitle
properties.description: SEO-optimized title for the category page

properties.name: seoDescription
properties.description: SEO meta description for the category page

properties.name: products
properties.description: Products belonging to this category

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Date and time when the category was created

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Date and time when the category was last updated

entities.name: Transaction
entities.summary: Represents a low-level interaction with a payment gateway or processor (e.g., authorize, capture, refund, void).

properties.name: transactionId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this specific gateway transaction.

properties.name: paymentId
properties.description: Identifier of the parent Payment this transaction belongs to.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The type of operation performed with the payment gateway.

properties.name: gatewayReferenceId
properties.description: Unique transaction ID provided by the external payment gateway.

properties.name: amount
properties.description: The amount associated with this specific transaction operation.

properties.name: currency
properties.description: Currency of the transaction amount.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status reported by the gateway for this specific operation.

properties.name: responseCode
properties.description: Response code returned by the payment gateway.

properties.name: responseMessage
properties.description: Detailed message or reason returned by the gateway.

properties.name: processedAt
properties.description: Timestamp when the transaction was processed by the gateway.

properties.name: rawRequest
properties.description: Raw request payload sent to the gateway (use with caution).

properties.name: rawResponse
properties.description: Raw response payload received from the gateway (use with caution).

entities.name: PaymentRefunded
entities.summary: Represents refunded payment transactions for orders in the e-commerce system.

properties.name: refundId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the refund

properties.name: paymentId
properties.description: Payment this refund is associated with

properties.name: amount
properties.description: Refund amount

properties.name: currency
properties.description: Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current refund status

properties.name: processedAt
properties.description: Date and time when refund was processed

properties.name: failureReason
properties.description: Reason for refund failure if applicable

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Date and time when the refund record was created

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Date and time when the refund record was last updated

entities.name: PaymentMethod
entities.summary: Represents a payment instrument a customer can use, like a credit card or bank account.

properties.name: paymentMethodId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the payment method.

properties.name: customerId
properties.description: Identifier of the customer who owns this payment method.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The type of payment method.

properties.name: details
properties.description: Contains type-specific, often sensitive details (e.g., last 4 digits of card, card brand, bank name, account type, token). **Never store raw PANs or sensitive data.**

properties.name: isDefault
properties.description: Indicates if this is the customer's default payment method.

properties.name: billingAddressId
properties.description: Identifier for the billing address verified for this payment method.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current status of the payment method.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Timestamp when the payment method was added.

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Timestamp when the payment method was last updated.

entities.name: Payment
entities.summary: Represents payment transactions for orders in the e-commerce system.

properties.name: paymentId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the payment

properties.name: orderId
properties.description: Order this payment is associated with

properties.name: customerId
properties.description: Customer who made the payment

properties.name: amount
properties.description: Payment amount

properties.name: currency
properties.description: Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

properties.name: paymentMethod
properties.description: Payment method used

properties.name: paymentMethodDetails
properties.description: Additional payment method specific details

properties.name: cardLast4
properties.description: Last 4 digits of card number

properties.name: cardType
properties.description: Card type (Visa, MasterCard, etc.)

properties.name: expiryMonth
properties.description: Card expiry month

properties.name: expiryYear
properties.description: Card expiry year

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current payment status

properties.name: transactionId
properties.description: External payment processor transaction ID

properties.name: gatewayResponse
properties.description: Raw response from payment gateway

properties.name: billingAddress
properties.description: Billing address for the payment

properties.name: processedAt
properties.description: Date and time when payment was processed

properties.name: failureReason
properties.description: Reason for payment failure if applicable

properties.name: refunds
properties.description: Refunds associated with this payment

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Date and time when the payment record was created

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Date and time when the payment record was last updated

entities.name: Invoice
entities.summary: Represents a bill issued to a customer, detailing charges for products or services.

properties.name: invoiceId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the invoice.

properties.name: customerId
properties.description: Identifier of the customer being invoiced

properties.name: orderId
properties.description: Identifier of the associated order, if applicable.

properties.name: subscriptionId
properties.description: Identifier of the associated subscription, if applicable.

properties.name: invoiceNumber
properties.description: Human-readable, sequential identifier for the invoice (may have specific format).

properties.name: issueDate
properties.description: Date the invoice was generated and issued.

properties.name: dueDate
properties.description: Date by which the payment for the invoice is due.

properties.name: totalAmount
properties.description: The total amount due on the invoice.

properties.name: currency
properties.description: Currency of the invoice amount.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current status of the invoice.

properties.name: billingAddressId
properties.description: Identifier for the billing address used on this invoice.

properties.name: lineItems
properties.description: List of individual items or services being charged on the invoice.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was created.

properties.name: paidAt
properties.description: Timestamp when the invoice was marked as paid.

entities.name: Address
entities.summary: Represents shipping and billing addresses for customers and orders.

properties.name: addressId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the address

properties.name: customerId
properties.description: Customer this address belongs to

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of address

properties.name: firstName
properties.description: First name of the recipient

properties.name: lastName
properties.description: Last name of the recipient

properties.name: company
properties.description: Company name if applicable

properties.name: addressLine1
properties.description: Primary address line (street address)

properties.name: addressLine2
properties.description: Secondary address line (apartment, suite, etc.)

properties.name: city
properties.description: City name

properties.name: state
properties.description: State or province

properties.name: postalCode
properties.description: Postal or ZIP code

properties.name: country
properties.description: Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)

properties.name: phone
properties.description: Phone number for delivery contact

properties.name: isDefault
properties.description: Whether this is the default address for the customer

properties.name: isValidated
properties.description: Whether the address has been validated

properties.name: validationDetails
properties.description: Address validation details

properties.name: validatedAt
properties.description: When the address was validated

properties.name: validationService
properties.description: Service used for validation

properties.name: confidence
properties.description: Validation confidence score

properties.name: geocoordinates
properties.description: Geographic coordinates for the address

properties.name: latitude
properties.description: Latitude coordinate

properties.name: longitude
properties.description: Longitude coordinate

properties.name: deliveryInstructions
properties.description: Special delivery instructions

properties.name: orders
properties.description: Orders using this address

properties.name: payments
properties.description: Payments using this as billing address

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Date and time when the address was created

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Date and time when the address was last updated

entities.name: Warehouse
entities.summary: Represents a physical storage location. Contains stock items and defines storage zones.

properties.name: warehouseId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the warehouse

properties.name: code
properties.description: Short warehouse code (e.g. EU-WEST-1, US-EAST-2)

properties.name: name
properties.description: Human-readable warehouse name

properties.name: address
properties.description: Physical address of the warehouse

properties.name: region
properties.description: Geographic region for shipping calculations

properties.name: capacity
properties.description: Maximum storage units the warehouse can hold

properties.name: currentUtilization
properties.description: Current number of units stored

properties.name: isActive
properties.description: Whether the warehouse is currently operational

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: When the warehouse was registered

entities.name: Stock Movement
entities.summary: An immutable record of a stock quantity change — the audit trail for all inventory adjustments, transfers, and fulfillments.

properties.name: movementId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this movement record

properties.name: stockItemId
properties.description: The stock item affected by this movement

properties.name: type
properties.description: The kind of movement

properties.name: quantity
properties.description: Number of units moved (positive for additions, negative for removals)

properties.name: reason
properties.description: Human-readable reason for the movement

properties.name: sourceWarehouseId
properties.description: Source warehouse for transfers

properties.name: destinationWarehouseId
properties.description: Destination warehouse for transfers

properties.name: reservationId
properties.description: Linked reservation if this movement was a fulfillment

properties.name: performedBy
properties.description: User or system that performed the movement

properties.name: occurredAt
properties.description: When the movement physically occurred

properties.name: recordedAt
properties.description: When the movement was recorded in the system

entities.name: Stock Item
entities.summary: Aggregate root for the Inventory bounded context. Tracks stock levels, reservations, and reorder policies for a single product within a warehouse.

properties.name: stockItemId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the stock item aggregate

properties.name: sku
properties.description: Stock Keeping Unit — unique product identifier

properties.name: productName
properties.description: Denormalized product name for display

properties.name: warehouseId
properties.description: Warehouse this stock is held in

properties.name: quantityOnHand
properties.description: Total physical units currently in the warehouse

properties.name: quantityReserved
properties.description: Units reserved by pending orders (not yet shipped)

properties.name: quantityAvailable
properties.description: Calculated field — onHand minus reserved

properties.name: reorderPolicy
properties.description: Policy governing when and how much to reorder

properties.name: reservations
properties.description: Active reservations against this stock item

properties.name: movements
properties.description: Audit trail of all stock movements

properties.name: unitCost
properties.description: Cost per unit for inventory valuation

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current status — ACTIVE, DISCONTINUED, or QUARANTINED

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: When this stock item was first tracked

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Last modification timestamp

entities.name: Reservation
entities.summary: A temporary hold on stock units, created when an order is confirmed and released on shipment or cancellation.

properties.name: reservationId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this reservation

properties.name: stockItemId
properties.description: The stock item this reservation is held against

properties.name: orderId
properties.description: The order that requested this reservation

properties.name: quantity
properties.description: Number of units reserved

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current state of the reservation

properties.name: expiresAt
properties.description: When this reservation automatically expires if not fulfilled

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: When the reservation was created

entities.name: Reorder Policy
entities.summary: Defines the restocking rules for a stock item — when to reorder and how much. Treated as a value object owned by the StockItem aggregate.

properties.name: reorderPolicyId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this reorder policy

properties.name: reorderPoint
properties.description: Stock level at which a reorder is triggered

properties.name: reorderQuantity
properties.description: Number of units to order when restocking

properties.name: maximumStockLevel
properties.description: Upper bound — do not reorder beyond this level

properties.name: leadTimeDays
properties.description: Expected supplier lead time in days

properties.name: safetyStockLevel
properties.description: Buffer stock to maintain during lead time

properties.name: isAutoReorderEnabled
properties.description: Whether the system automatically places reorder requests

entities.name: ShoppingCart
entities.summary: Represents a customer's shopping cart containing products before checkout.

properties.name: cartId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the shopping cart

properties.name: customerId
properties.description: Customer who owns this cart (null for guest carts)

properties.name: sessionId
properties.description: Session identifier for guest carts

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current status of the cart

properties.name: cartItems
properties.description: Items in the shopping cart

properties.name: subtotal
properties.description: Subtotal amount before taxes and shipping

properties.name: taxAmount
properties.description: Calculated tax amount

properties.name: shippingAmount
properties.description: Calculated shipping amount

properties.name: discountAmount
properties.description: Total discount amount applied

properties.name: totalAmount
properties.description: Final total amount including taxes and shipping

properties.name: currency
properties.description: Currency code for all amounts

properties.name: appliedCoupons
properties.description: Coupon codes applied to this cart

properties.name: shippingAddress
properties.description: Selected shipping address

properties.name: billingAddress
properties.description: Selected billing address

properties.name: notes
properties.description: Customer notes or special instructions

properties.name: abandonedAt
properties.description: Date and time when cart was abandoned

properties.name: convertedToOrderId
properties.description: Order ID if cart was successfully converted

properties.name: expiresAt
properties.description: Date and time when cart expires

properties.name: createdAt
properties.description: Date and time when the cart was created

properties.name: updatedAt
properties.description: Date and time when the cart was last updated

entities.name: OrderItem
entities.summary: Represents a single item within a customer's order.

properties.name: orderItemId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the order item

properties.name: orderId
properties.description: Identifier for the parent Order

properties.name: productId
properties.description: Identifier for the product being ordered

properties.name: productName
properties.description: Name of the product at the time of order

properties.name: quantity
properties.description: Number of units of the product ordered

properties.name: unitPrice
properties.description: Price per unit of the product at the time of order

properties.name: totalPrice
properties.description: Total price for this item line (quantity * unitPrice)

entities.name: Order
entities.summary: Represents a customer's request to purchase products or services.

properties.name: orderId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the order

properties.name: orderNumber
properties.description: Unique identifier for the order

properties.name: customerId
properties.description: Identifier for the customer placing the order test

properties.name: orderDate
properties.description: Date and time when the order was placed

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled)

properties.name: orderItems
properties.description: List of items included in the order

properties.name: totalAmount
properties.description: Total monetary value of the order

properties.name: shippingAddress
properties.description: Address where the order should be shipped

properties.name: billingAddress
properties.description: Address for billing purposes

properties.name: payment
properties.description: Payment associated with this order

properties.name: convertedFromCartId
properties.description: Shopping cart that was converted to this order

entities.name: Customer
entities.summary: Represents an individual or organization that places orders.

properties.name: customerId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the customer

properties.name: firstName
properties.description: Customer's first name

properties.name: lastName
properties.description: Customer's last name

properties.name: email
properties.description: Customer's primary email address (unique)

properties.name: phone
properties.description: Customer's phone number

properties.name: addresses
properties.description: List of addresses associated with the customer (e.g., shipping, billing)

properties.name: dateRegistered
properties.description: Date and time when the customer registered

entities.name: CartItem
entities.summary: Represents an individual item within a shopping cart.

properties.name: cartItemId

properties.name: productId
properties.description: Product being added to cart

properties.description: Product name snapshot at time of adding to cart

properties.name: totalPrice

properties.name: discountAmount

properties.description: Product color if applicable

containers.name: Subscriptions DB
containers.summary: Primary database for subscription plans, user subscriptions, and recurring billing cycles

containers.name: Payments DB
containers.summary: Primary database for payment transactions and payment method records

containers.name: Payment Cache
containers.summary: High-performance cache for payment session data and idempotency checks

containers.name: ML Model Store
containers.summary: Object storage for trained ML models, model artifacts, and versioned fraud detection models

containers.name: Fraud Analytics DB
containers.summary: Analytics database for fraud detection patterns, risk scoring, and transaction analysis

containers.name: Orders DB
containers.purpose: System of record for Orders and OrderLines

containers.name: Order Metadata Store
containers.summary: Long-term storage of order documents, receipts, and metadata files

containers.name: Notifications Queue
containers.summary: Message queue for asynchronous notification delivery across email, SMS, and push channels

containers.name: Inventory Read Model
containers.summary: Projection of stock levels from Inventory domain

containers.name: Inventory DB
containers.summary: Authoritative database for product inventory levels, warehouse stock, and inventory movements
